sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.1g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 0.1g. omega 3 is doing serious work here. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 15.2g. glycemic index, fibre, and sugar are doing most of the work. for fruit, the tradeoff is sweetness versus fibre, satiety, and overall payoff.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 15.2g. glycemic index, fibre, and sugar are doing most of the work. for fruit, the tradeoff is sweetness versus fibre, satiety, and overall payoff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 0.4g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 0.4g. protein quality is clearly one of the selling points. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 5% DV, vitamin a at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 5% DV, vitamin a at 0% DV stand out most. that is not enough to move the verdict very far on its own.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 2% DV, iron at 1% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 2% DV, iron at 1% DV stand out most. that stays fairly limited overall.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. hydrating whole-fruit package because water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.subtitleText: the upsides first. hydrating whole-fruit package because water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. protein contribution is tiny because that is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth. sugar can climb fast because a lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet. satiety is not especially strong because fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Pear stands out for hydrating whole-fruit package and easy to use as a whole food. but it also gets held back by protein contribution is tiny and sugar can climb fast. Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
